sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n53092" key="kanqh/lh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κανθήλη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n53092.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">καλαμανθήλη</ref></xr>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rush used for candle-wicks, Edict. Diocl.</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">18.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
